"'''Maul Madness'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Tim Bresnan]] in [[2005]]. It depicts an alternate version of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']], in which [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] defeats [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and attempts to capture [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Queen Amidala]].
